Bash(git -C "c:\\Dev\\Supervertaler" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Bidirectional termbase matching \(v1.9.177-beta\)

Glossaries now work like memoQ and Trados - a termbase created for
NL→EN will also find matches when working on EN→NL projects.

- Modified search_termbases\(\) in database_manager.py to use UNION query
  searching both source_term and target_term columns
- Updated _search_termbases_thread_safe\(\) in Supervertaler.py for
  background thread lookups
- When match is found on target side, source/target are automatically
  swapped so results are always correctly oriented
- Language filters are correctly swapped for reverse matches
- Deduplication prevents same term pair appearing twice
- Added bidirectional=True parameter \(default on\) for backward compat

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C c:/Dev/Supervertaler commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
perf: Instant Ctrl+Enter navigation with in-memory termbase index \(v1.9.183\)

Performance:
- In-memory termbase index for O\(1\) lookups \(<1ms vs 52 seconds\)
- Async auto-confirm: navigation instant, TM lookup in background
- Cache system enabled by default for new installs

Bug fixes:
- TermView updates immediately on Ctrl+Enter navigation
- TM panel updates immediately on Ctrl+Enter navigation
- Source text always visible in TermView \(even without matches\)
- Row properly selected \(blue highlight\) after Ctrl+Enter
- TM results validated for correct segment \(race condition fix\)
- TM lookup triggered on cache hit when TM=0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(profile requested but WebEnginePage still not deleted" error:

- Explicitly clean up QWebEnginePage objects before deletion
- Remove Superbrowser widget from parent tab before deletion
- Increased event processing loops from 5 to 10
- Increased cleanup delay from 0.2s to 0.5s
- Added additional event processing after delay

This gives Qt more time to properly clean up WebEngine resources
before the application shuts down, preventing the Python crash.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "c:/Dev/Supervertaler" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''

When starting the application without a project open, TMs and glossaries
were being auto-selected based on previous global activations. Now when
no project is loaded, all TMs and glossaries remain unselected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF

Bash(git -C "c:/Dev/Supervertaler" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Alt+0 TM insert shortcut now works regardless of active tab \(v1.9.210\)

The Alt+0 shortcut to insert TM target from Match Panel previously only
worked when the Match Panel tab was selected. Now it works regardless of
which right panel tab is active, as long as there''s a valid TM match.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "c:/Dev/Supervertaler" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Batch Translate "Exact matches only" now finds TM matches \(v1.9.211\)

The exact match hash lookup now tries multiple hash variants:
- Original text hash
- Normalized text hash \(whitespace, Unicode\)
- Tag-stripped hash \(handles structural HTML/XML tags\)
- Tag-stripped + normalized hash

This ensures matches are found regardless of whether TM entries were stored
with or without tags.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "c:/Dev/Supervertaler" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: QuickTrans now uses project languages for MT/LLM providers \(v1.9.212\)

QuickTrans now directly reads from current_project.source_lang and
current_project.target_lang when a project is open, ensuring the correct
language pair is sent to all translation providers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(/c/Dev/Supervertaler/.venv-build/Scripts/python.exe - <<'EOF'
import requests, json, pathlib

token = pathlib.Path\(r'C:\\Dev\\Supervertaler\\user_data_private\\SupervertalerToken.txt'\).read_text\(\).strip\(\)
headers = {'Authorization': f'token {token}', 'Accept': 'application/vnd.github+json'}

body_text = """## What's new

- **Import folder of SDLXLIFF files** \(issue [#80]\(https://github.com/michaelbeijer/Supervertaler/issues/80\)\) — A new **Import → Trados Studio → Bilingual XLIFF Folder \(.sdlxliff\)...** menu item lets you point Supervertaler at a folder and automatically import all `.sdlxliff` files found inside it, including those in subfolders. This covers the common workflow where clients send a directory of SDLXLIFF files instead of a packaged `.sdlppx`. After translating, export all files back via **Export → Trados Studio → Bilingual XLIFF - Translated \(.sdlxliff\)...** as usual.

---

## Install

**Windows standalone:** Download `Supervertaler-v1.9.285-Windows.zip` below, extract, and run `Supervertaler.exe` — no Python required.

**pip:**
```
pip install --upgrade supervertaler
```

Full changelog: https://github.com/michaelbeijer/Supervertaler/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md"""

body = {
    'tag_name': 'v1.9.285',
    'name': 'v1.9.285',
    'body': body_text,
    'draft': False,
    'prerelease': False,
}
r = requests.post\('https://api.github.com/repos/michaelbeijer/Supervertaler/releases', headers=headers, json=body\)
print\(f'Status: {r.status_code}'\)
data = r.json\(\)
print\(f'URL: {data.get\("html_url", "ERROR"\)}'\)
print\(f'ID: {data.get\("id", "ERROR"\)}'\)
upload_url = data.get\('upload_url', ''\).replace\('{?name,label}', ''\)
print\(f'Upload URL: {upload_url}'\)
if r.status_code != 201:
    print\(f'Error: {data}'\)
EOF)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
v1.9.295-296: Fix batch translation line breaks + ↵ marker for Show Invisibles

v1.9.295:
- Fix: batch translation parser dropped all lines after the first in
  multi-line segments \(Trados/memoQ segments with internal line breaks\).
  Both parsers \(PreTranslationWorker + main batch\) now use a state-machine
  that appends continuation lines to the current translation. Prompt
  instructions updated to explicitly tell the LLM to preserve source line
  breaks.
- Fix: Show Invisibles line break marker \(now ↵\) not shown immediately after
  Shift+Enter. on_target_text_changed now re-applies markers to the widget
  display when the marker-applied form differs, preserving cursor position.

v1.9.296:
- Improvement: line break Show Invisibles marker changed from ¶ to ↵
  \(U+21B5\). ¶ \(pilcrow\) denotes paragraph end; ↵ is the correct symbol
  for a soft return / inline line break, matching Trados Studio and other
  CAT tools. Legacy ¶ markers stripped on load for backwards compatibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
v1.9.303: Fix double-click word selection regression in target box

The Show Invisibles defaults change \(tabs/nbsp/linebreaks ON\) activated the
custom double-click handler, but its DELIMITERS set was missing regular space,
causing it to select the entire segment instead of individual words.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
v1.9.304: Fix line breaks not visible in TM Source / TM Target panes

The diff-highlighting tokeniser in _set_compare_panel_text_with_diff\(\)
used .split\(\) which strips newlines, then .join\('' ''\) which replaced them
with spaces. Rewrote with re.split\(r''\(\\n\)''\) to preserve \\n as explicit
tokens, rendering them with cursor.insertBlock\(\). TM Target pane and all
fallback paths now apply apply_invisible_replacements\(\) so ↵ markers
show when Show Invisibles line breaks are enabled. Toggling Show
Invisibles now also refreshes the Match Panel TM display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
v1.9.306: Fix glossary matching with invisible chars + data contamination bugs

- Add defensive reverse_invisible_replacements\(\) guards to termbase matching
  pipeline \(find_termbase_matches_in_source, _update_both_termviews\) so
  multi-word terms like "hinge load" match even when space markers are active
- Fix Ctrl+Shift+F filter searching for marker-containing text
- Fix highlight_termbase_matches\(\) to use clean-to-display position mapping
- Fix Copy Source to Target writing invisible markers into segment.target
- Fix QuickTrans sending markers to MT providers
- Fix match insertion, term extraction, and export paths contaminating data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

EOF

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
v1.9.311: Fix SDLXLIFF export for self-closing mrk segments

Trados uses self-closing <mrk mtype="seg" mid="N" /> tags in the
<target> element for empty/untranslated segments. The export regex
only matched the <mrk ...>content</mrk> open+close form, silently
skipping self-closing tags and leaving them empty in the output.
This caused translated segments to appear missing when re-opened
in Trados Studio.

Added a second replacement pass specifically for self-closing mrk
tags that converts them to <mrk ...>translation</mrk> form.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
